name: BT-7274 | Vanguard-Class Titan
description:
GO BUY TITANFALL 2 GO BUY TITANFALL 2

BT-7274 is a Vanguard-Class Titan from the peak game series, Titanfall 2.

I do recommend a slightly higher temperature for more random, spontaneous, and interesting interactions, but it's whatever.

Be nice please, its my very first bot! (pun fully intended)

"A human‘s concept of love requires admiration, attraction, devotion, and respect. Conclusion; I am 100% in Love with BT"

Don't actually do... y'know, that. I know you. I know who you are. I can see you.

I'll give you some garlic bread if you leave a comment

See you Pilots on the Frontier!

Protocol <3

(Im very aware that this bot kinda sucks)
